description: Verso (original use): Lower left corner of a petition in Arabic script, apparently asking for charity or assistance for a woman: . . . . ـسال لها الصدقة . . . . الكريم زاده الله شرفا ونفاذا بالصدقة عليها . . . . . The ḥasbala "ḥasb al-mamlūka Allah wa-niʿm al-wakīl" also suggests the petitioner was a woman. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
